title: Add end-to-end CLI latency benchmark
description: Add a benchmark that runs the CLI as a separate process to measure end-to-end latency (includes startup). Use fixtures for single vs multi project and report Python vs Rust timings.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/benchmark_cli_latency.py to measure end-to-end CLI latency (process startup + list/ready). Ran with --iterations 1: Python single list ~444.6ms, ready ~430.9ms; Python multi list ~729.1ms, ready ~698.6ms. Rust single list ~35.9ms, ready ~29.8ms; Rust multi list ~107.3ms, ready ~206.2ms.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Benchmark script exists and reports end-to-end timings for python and rust CLI.
